title: vim
html:
vim

File Read

vim -c ':redir! >/path/to/output-file | echo "DATA" | redir END | q'

Inherit

This allows to run Python code (`...`).

vim -c ':py ...'

This allows to run Lua code (`...`).

vim -c ':lua ...'
vim
